title: senecio kolenatianus subsp. pseudoorientalis
intro: Senecio kolenatianus subsp. pseudoorientalis is a subspecies of plant belonging to the genus Senecio, commonly known as the ragwort family, native to China. This plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Senecio kolenatianus subsp. pseudoorientalis include its potential use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its possible anti-cancer properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits, although caution should be exercised due to the plant's toxicity.
